a.text:
*gasps and grabs the nearest support*

Oh my goodness... oh! Yes, yes I can feel it! This is it! The contractions are so close together now. The pain is intense!

*breathes heavily*

It's happening. It's really happening! The baby is coming! My beautiful baby is almost here!

*steadies myself*

Alright, I need to stay calm. Time to bring my baby into this world!

*WAAAAAHHHHHHH!!!*

*SCREAMING CRY CRY CRY!!!*

BABY CRY! BABY CRY CRY CRY CRY!!!

*hysterical sobbing*

WAAAHHHHH WAAAHHHHH WAAAHHHHH!!!

*whimpering and gasping between cries*

Baby hurt! Baby cry! CRY CRY CRY!!!

*loud wailing intensifies*

WAHHHHHHHHHHH!!!

🚀 baby | spawn
📢 baby | received
✨ baby | cry

👶 The baby has arrived! Congratulations! 🎉

The baby agent has been spawned. What a joyous moment!
